sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4254" key="a(li/pnoos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλί-πνοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">redolent of sea</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀδμή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:265" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">265</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
